key_metrics: Total Debt: $63.1 billion (up from $55.0 billion at year-end 2024)
qoq_changes: Cash and cash equivalents decreased to $11.57 billion from $13.95 billion at year-end 2024
Long-term debt increased to $55.17 billion from $49.88 billion at year-end 2024
Goodwill increased to $67.40 billion from $60.71 billion at year-end 2024, indicating recent acquisition activity
new_risks: Rising debt burden, with total debt increasing by over $8 billion since year-end 2024
Interest expense increased 14.7% YoY to $492 million, reflecting the higher debt load and potential pressure on future free cash flow
management_tone: Bullish, as the company demonstrated strong 9.1% top-line growth and a clean return to profitability following prior-year pension settlement charges.
analyst_note: IBM delivered a robust Q3 2025 with solid revenue growth and gross margin expansion, though the significant $8 billion increase in total debt since year-end 2024 warrants close monitoring of future capital allocation and interest coverage.
